data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 7/25(Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Commissions will be doubled.
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 7/25 (Mon) 19:00 – 8/1 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
